Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Video.summary: Keith has been accused of touching his 3-year-old son inappropriately by Crystal, the mother of his children, which he strongly denies. He says this is the result of her anger over an affair he had. But will the lie detector test prove him right?
Video.title: I Stand Accused

Video.summary: Alvin began to get very distant from his family, so Andrea began a relationship with Chris, a man she met on a chat line. Then, Brittany and Tony have an infant daughter together, but since getting Brittany pregnant he has abandoned his family.
Video.title: You Said I Wasn't The Father

Image.alt: You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father

Video.summary: Nykki, Jayda, Tammy and Pamela are here because Larry has fathered children with them. They say Larry not only an abusive deadbeat, but also engages in drugs, alcohol and pimps some of them out. Don’t miss the drama today!
Video.title: Steve is Speechless

Video.summary: Because of messages Dashana found on social media and her new boyfriend's phone, she suspects he is cheating; Richard says his girlfriend's family found her in bed with another man and forced her to tell him; Sean sets up cameras to spy on his wife.
Video.title: Shocking Cheating Confessions

Video.summary: Kaliegh is 23 and is a heroin addict. Her mother, best friend and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin in the first place, are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!
Video.title: My Daughter Prostitutes for Heroin

Video.summary: Katrina is fed up with her boyfriend Ismael's abusive and controlling ways. Katrina says Ismael acts this way because he believes she has been cheating. Then, Christie has been married to Chris for 8 months and he already suspects her infidelity.
Video.title: Accusers Turned Abusers

Video.summary: A year ago, Jessica confessed to violently shaking her infant son and causing him severe brain injuries. But now Jessica has recanted and claims that a sippy cup caused his injuries. Be sure to tune in to hear the truth!
Video.title: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Video.summary: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle’s boyfriend Ashley is molesting Tenielle’s 4 year old daughter! Latoya and the child’s father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!
Video.title: Explosive Lie Detector Results

Video.summary: Chamira left her family for prostitution, but then she sent her sister Latoya a pornographic video featuring minors. Emily received calls claiming that her fiancé Kevin was cheating on her and selling drugs. What will the lie detector tests say?
Video.title: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family
Drugs and Sex Destroyed Our Family

Video.summary: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.
Video.title: I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Image.alt: I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Video.summary: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.
Video.title: My Mom Made Me Lie

Video.summary: Christopher had to move away for a job and his wife, Ashley, says that she won't move until he proves that he's not a cheater. Then, Tim is worried that his wife Sasha is cheating because he found Facebook messages from her ex.
Video.title: Will These Results Destroy Us

Video.summary: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.
Video.title: Is It Love ... Or Lies?

Video.summary: Robert is here to find out if his ex was ever pregnant with their child. What will the lie detector say?
Video.title: Did You Ever Have My Baby?

Image.alt: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
Did You Ever Have My Baby?
Did You Ever Have My Baby?

Video.summary: We'll get real about hazing and Katie spills the beans about financing her tuition!
Video.title: College Life Uncovered Part 1

Video.summary: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating.
Video.title: Steve Gets The Real Update

Video.summary: At 13 years old, Meghan had issues with alcohol and now she is addicted to heroin.
Video.title: Teens: Addiction and Pregnancy

Video.summary: Teneal lost custody due to her poor parenting habits. But she tells a different tale and blames the father.
Video.title: An Explosive DNA Story

Video.summary: Miranda says that her fiancée is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. But has he been cheating with her enemy?
Video.title: You Had Sex with My Worst Enemy

Image.alt: You Had Sex with My Worst Enemy
You Had Sex with My Worst Enemy
You Had Sex with My Worst Enemy

Video.summary: 17-year-old Naomi's attitude has changed for the worst, and is now on a mission to have a baby.
Video.title: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby

Image.alt: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby

Video.summary: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face.
Video.title: Real Teens: Real Topics

Video.summary: Melody believes her boyfriend Glenn hired Marra to wash cars in a bikini and sleep with him.
Video.title: Did My Sister Have Sex With My Boyfriend Again?

Image.alt: Did My Sister Have Sex With My Boyfriend Again?
Did My Sister Have Sex With My Boyfriend Again?
Did My Sister Have Sex With My Boyfriend Again?

Video.summary: Brianna and Sam are ready to be parents, but their parents are here to convince them that 18 is too young.
Video.title: Teens Desperate To Have a Baby

Image.alt: Teens Desperate To Have a Baby
Teens Desperate To Have a Baby
Teens Desperate To Have a Baby

Video.summary: Tonya is here to stop her 14-year-old daughter Talia from ruining her life before she’s an adult. She doesn’t approve of her boyfriend Jerry who needs to get out of her daughter’s life because he’s responsible for everything that’s wrong with her.
Video.title: You’re Stealing My Daughter’s Childhood

Video.summary: After Juanita’s mother was murdered, things became strange, especially when her father Eric didn’t attend the funeral. She believes he was involved in the murder, but her sister Nora thinks she’s crazy. Can Steve help put this mystery to bed?
Video.title: Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?

Image.alt: Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?
Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?
Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?

Video.summary: As a child, this young girl was left by her mother to be raped by an older man in order for her to get drugs.
Video.title: Was I Sold For Drugs?

Video.summary: First, Daniel has almost a dozen children with ten different women. While he admits to being their father, he refuses to care and provide for most of them. Then, Tadrianna strips and has sex for money and her mother, Kim, can't convince her to stop.
Video.title: I Have 11 Kids with 10 Women

Video.summary: Alec called the show to say that his girlfriend Tori is being physically and mentally abusive. He says he needs Steve to help him give her a wakeup call and start showing him the respect that he deserves.
Video.title: My Girlfriend Beats Me

Video.summary: Colleen's son, Dalton has suffered with cancer for ten years. Patrick, the boy's father, left the picture when Dalton was only an infant, and after falling on hard times ended up homeless. But now he wants to be back in Dalton's life.
Video.title: Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Image.alt: Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Video.summary: Seth kicked Byrnelle out a few months back because he was tired of her cheating. Is Steve able to help?
Video.title: What if She Is Your Daughter?

Image.alt: What if She Is Your Daughter?
What if She Is Your Daughter?
What if She Is Your Daughter?

Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Latonya says her wife told her she was raped and became pregnant with triplets, but doctors later said she was never pregnant.
Video.title: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Image.alt: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
